title: aretia × floerkeana
intro: Aretia × floerkeana, also known as Geranium maculatum, is a perennial flowering plant native to Eastern North America. Its medicinal properties include being a natural anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal agent, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and fungal infections. The health benefits of Aretia × floerkeana include reducing menstrual cramps, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Aretia × floerkeana include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
